title: Oreogrammitis neocaledonica
taxonomy: Oreogrammitis neocaledonica is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern native to New Caledonia. The classification of this species is as follows: kingdom Plantae, phylum Tracheophyta, class Polypodiopsida, order Polypodiales, family Polypodiaceae, genus Oreogrammitis, and species O. neocaledonica. The genus Oreogrammitis belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, which is a family of ferns. Oreogrammitis neocaledonica is a rare and endangered species due to habitat loss and other environmental factors.

intro: Oreogrammitis neocaledonica, also known as the Neocaledonian silver fern, is a species of fern native to New Caledonia, characterized by its shiny, silver-green leaves.
